title: trifolium strictum var. elatum
intro: Trifolium strictum var. elatum, also known as the tall red clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Africa, and Asia. This plant is rich in isoflavones, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The tall red clover is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone density. Tall red clover is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and infusions, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb require further research and validation.
